required_preferences.fact: Works out in hotel gyms or outdoors during international trips, regardless of time of day — accepts evening workouts while traveling for merger meetings.

supersedes.fact: Works out only in the early morning — will skip entirely rather than exercise later in the day

required_preferences.fact: Switches to video or phone calendar check-ins with his spouse three times a week after dinner, rather than nightly in person, during her summer fellowship

supersedes.fact: Reviews the next day's calendar with his spouse every night after dinner — insists on this as a shared ritual

required_preferences.fact: Prepares and eats the same oatmeal and fruit breakfast every weekday — never varies his morning meal except on weekends
Plans monthly weekend trips to visit his boarding school child, aligning family schedules around school events and breaks whenever possible.
Uses a digital platform to log daily sodium intake and activity minutes, shares logs weekly with his cardiology care team for compliance checks
Responds to all colleague texts within an hour but only replies to non-urgent emails in batches at midday and evening

persona: An executive at a manufacturing firm overseeing digital transformation initiatives
